zh.lifeSummary: 當Thiébaut Ier de Bar於1156年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Renaud II de Bar35歲，母親Agnès de Blois-Champagne26歲。他於1176年與Laurette van Loon結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年2月13日在法國洛萊享年58歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆斯沙吉米爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thiébaut Ier de Bar于1156年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Renaud II de Bar35岁，母亲Agnès de Blois-Champagne26岁。他于1176年与Laurette van Loon结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年2月13日在法国洛萊享年58岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆斯沙吉米爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Thiébaut
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Thiébaut Ier de Bar was born in 1156, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Renaud II de Bar, was 35 and his mother, Agnès de Blois-Champagne, was 26. He married Laurette van Loon in 1176. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 13 February 1214, in Lorraine, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thiébaut Ier de Bar est né en 1156, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Renaud II de Bar, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Blois-Champagne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Laurette van Loon en 1176. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 février 1214, à Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thiébaut Ier de Bar 1156 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Renaud II de Bar 35 und seine Mutter Agnès de Blois-Champagne 26. Er hat 1176 Laurette van Loon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Februar 1214 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thiébaut Ier de Bar è nato il nel 1156 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Renaud II de Bar, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Blois-Champagne, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Laurette van Loon nel 1176. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 13 febbraio 1214, nel Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thiébaut Ier de Barが1156年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Renaud II de Barは35歳，母Agnès de Blois-Champagneは26歳であった。1176年にLaurette van Loonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年2月13日にフランスロレィヌで58歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウゼサイント-ミヒエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thiébaut Ier de Bar(이)가 1156년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renaud II de Bar(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Blois-Champagne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1176년 Laurette van Loon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 2월 13일 프랑스 로레이인에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우스 세인트-미히얼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thiébaut Ier de Bar nasceu em 1156, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Renaud II de Bar, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Blois-Champagne, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Laurette van Loon em 1176. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1214, em Lorraine, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thiébaut Ier de Bar родился в 1156 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Renaud II de Bar было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Blois-Champagne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Laurette van Loon в 1176 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 13 февраля 1214 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-михиел, меус, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thiébaut Ier de Bar nació en 1156, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Renaud II de Bar, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agnès de Blois-Champagne, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Laurette van Loon en 1176. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 13 de febrero de 1214, en Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Mihiel, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.
